Uses of Package
io.oxia.client.api

Packages that use io.oxia.client.api
Package
Description
io.oxia.client.api
The public API for interacting with Oxia.
io.oxia.client.internal
 
  • Classes in io.oxia.client.api used by io.oxia.client.api
    Class
    Description
    AsyncOxiaClient
    Non-blocking client for the Oxia service.
    Authentication
    Represents an interface for implementing authentication mechanisms.
    CloseableIterable
    An Iterable that holds resources which must be released by calling CloseableIterable.close().
    GetResult
    The result of a successful get / range-scan operation.
    Notification
    A notification from an Oxia server indicating a change to a record associated with a key.
    OxiaClientBuilder
    Entry point for creating an Oxia client.
    PutResult
    The result of a successful put operation.
    RangeScanConsumer
    Callback used by AsyncOxiaClient.rangeScan(String, String, RangeScanConsumer) to deliver records, errors, and the completion signal for a streaming range scan.
    SyncOxiaClient
    Blocking client for the Oxia service.
    Version
    Metadata associated with an Oxia record.
  • Classes in io.oxia.client.api used by io.oxia.client.internal
    Class
    Description
    OxiaClientBuilder
    Entry point for creating an Oxia client.
